Function.Inference: The entire track is a continuous background loop ending with a repeat sign.

Section.Inference: Introduces the main theme melody over a steady, repeating minor bass pattern.
The melody continues and develops in a higher register over shifting harmonies.
A highly rhythmic, syncopated chordal ostinato section lacking a single-note melody.
Features heavy, descending block chords and a progressing downward bassline.
A sparse, ambient breakdown featuring long, sustained dissonant chords.
Introduces a repeating chordal ostinato over a newly active and driving bass pattern.
Harmony shifts as a new melodic build begins over the continuing active bassline.
A brief, non-thematic turnaround phrase leading back to the beginning of the loop.
